meaning: vt.使公诸于众,揭开,揭幕,除去...的面纱vi.显露,除去面纱
examples: The sequel will finally unveil the family secret of why Po's father is a duck.
The company, which is expected to unveil a new version of the Kindle next week, did not say when Kindle titles would be available on mobile phones.
Last fall he was ready to unveil it as a 288-satellite system very much like Iridium.
In May Enron plans to unveil a version of the contract at a conference in New York.
